ques: Identify a model on Hugging Face designed for generating travel chats. Obtain information about the model, including its name, size and training framwork.
answer: Name: joycejiang/llama2-13B-chat-qlora-travel-1k-rs0 — a Llama-2 travel chatbot. Size: 13B parameters (base meta-llama/Llama-2-13b-chat-hf), QLoRA-tuned with 4-bit nf4 quantization. Training framework: PEFT 0.4.0 (with Hugging Face Transformers + bitsandbytes).
